products.name: Rolex GMT Master 2
products.description:
Rolex GMT-Master II

Selling Price: ₹8,000
Original Price: ₹16000+ 

About the Watch

The Rolex GMT-Master II is one of the most iconic luxury sports watches ever created. Originally developed for international pilots and travelers, it features a dual-time-zone function that allows the wearer to track multiple time zones simultaneously. Today, it is one of the most sought-after watches in the world.

Key Features

Automatic self-winding movement

GMT function for tracking multiple time zones

Rotatable 24-hour bezel

Date display with Cyclops magnifier

Oyster-style bracelet

Premium stainless steel construction

Luminous hands and markers

Sapphire crystal

Water-resistant design

Iconic luxury sports watch styling


Design Highlights

The GMT-Master II is famous for its distinctive two-color ceramic bezel, available in legendary combinations such as "Pepsi" (Blue/Red), "Batman" (Blue/Black), and "Sprite" (Green/Black). Its sporty yet elegant design makes it suitable for travel, business, and everyday luxury wear.

Specifications

Movement: Automatic Mechanical

Display: Analog GMT

Case Material: Stainless Steel

Crystal: Sapphire Crystal

Bezel: 24-Hour Rotatable GMT Bezel

Bracelet: Oyster Stainless Steel

Water Resistance: 100M

Functions: Hours, Minutes, Seconds, Date, GMT


Package Includes

Rolex GMT-Master II Watch

Premium Watch Box

Protective Packaging


Perfect For

Frequent Travelers

Business Professionals

Luxury Watch Collectors

Daily Wear

Premium Gifting


Why the GMT-Master II is Famous

The GMT-Master II is considered one of the most desirable luxury sports watches ever made. Its combination of Rolex reliability, travel functionality, and timeless design has made it a favorite among pilots, collectors, celebrities, and watch enthusiasts worldwide.


Luxury Appeal:
The GMT-Master II is a symbol of success, adventure, and prestige, making it one of the most recognized watches in the world.

products.name: Richard mille RM 67-02
products.description:
Richard Mille RM 67-02 Automatic Extra Flat

Selling Price: ₹8,000
Original Price: ₹12000+ (depending on edition and athlete version)

About the Watch

The RM 67-02 is one of the most famous models from Richard Mille and is known as the brand's lightest automatic watch. Designed for elite athletes, it combines ultra-light materials, a skeletonized movement, and exceptional wearing comfort. The genuine RM 67-02 weighs only about 32 grams including the strap, making it one of the lightest luxury automatic watches ever created. 

Key Features

Ultra-lightweight luxury sports watch design

Automatic self-winding movement

Skeleton open-work dial

Extra-flat case profile

Carbon and Quartz TPT-inspired construction

Premium elastic sport strap

Sapphire crystal-inspired display

Visible mechanical movement

Comfortable all-day wear

Exclusive athlete-inspired color schemes


Design Highlights

The RM 67-02 features Richard Mille's signature tonneau-shaped case with a highly technical skeletonized movement. Its colorful sporty appearance, lightweight construction, and futuristic aesthetics make it one of the most recognizable luxury watches in the world. The model was developed to create a close "symbiosis" between athlete and watch during sports activities. 

Specifications

Movement: Automatic Mechanical (CRMA7 Calibre)

Display: Analog

Power Reserve: Approximately 50 Hours

Case Shape: Tonneau

Materials: Carbon TPT & Quartz TPT Inspired Design

Dial: Skeleton Open-Work

Strap: Elastic Sport Strap

Water Resistance: Daily Splash Resistant

Functions: Hours, Minutes, Automatic Winding 


Package Includes

Richard Mille RM 67-02 Watch

Premium Watch Box

Protective Packaging


Perfect For

Luxury Watch Enthusiasts

Sports & Casual Wear

Collectors

Fashion Influencers

Premium Gifting


Why the RM 67-02 is Famous

The RM 67-02 is celebrated for its ultra-thin construction, extreme lightness, and athlete-focused design. It has been worn by world-class athletes including Wayde van Niekerk and Alexis Pinturault, helping establish it as one of the most sought-after modern luxury sports watches.

products.name: Marsal Minnor III Earbuds
products.description:
Marshall Minor III True Wireless Earbuds

Selling Price: ₹6,000
Original Price: ₹8,999 – ₹11,999+ (depending on retailer and availability)

[Marshall Minor III Truly Wireless In-Ear Earbuds]()

About the Earbuds

The Marshall Minor III is a premium true wireless earbud designed with Marshall's iconic rock-inspired aesthetic and signature sound tuning. Featuring an open-fit design, Bluetooth 5.2 connectivity, and wireless charging, these earbuds are ideal for users who prefer comfort and awareness of their surroundings while listening to music. 

Key Features

Marshall Signature Sound

True Wireless Bluetooth 5.2 Connectivity

25 Hours Total Playtime

Open-Fit Comfortable Design

12mm Custom-Tuned Dynamic Drivers

Touch Controls

Auto Play & Pause

Wireless Charging Support

USB-C Fast Charging

IPX4 Water Resistance

Built-in Microphones for Calls 


Specifications

Driver Size: 12mm Dynamic Drivers

Bluetooth Version: 5.2

Earbud Battery Life: Up to 5 Hours

Total Battery Life: Up to 25 Hours with Charging Case

Charging: USB-C & Wireless Charging

Water Resistance: IPX4 (Earbuds)

App Support: Marshall Bluetooth App

Weight: Approximately 4g per Earbud 


Design Highlights

The Minor III features Marshall's iconic black-and-gold styling inspired by their legendary guitar amplifiers. Its open-fit design rests comfortably outside the ear canal, making it ideal for long listening sessions and users who dislike silicone ear tips. 

Package Includes

Marshall Minor III Earbuds

Charging Case

USB-C Charging Cable

User Manual

Warranty Information 


Perfect For

Music Lovers

Daily Commuting

Gym & Casual Use

Calls & Video Meetings

Premium Gifting


Things to Know

The Minor III is focused on sound quality and comfort rather than advanced features. It does not include Active Noise Cancellation (ANC), which may be a consideration if you frequently use earbuds in noisy environments. Some users on Reddit have reported battery and reliability issues, while others appreciate the sound signature and design.

# Seiko Skeleton GMT Mod

## Product Overview

The RM 30-01 is celebrated for its innovative Declutchable Rotor, a technology that automatically stops winding when the power reserve reaches its optimum level and re-engages when needed. products.name: Rolex automatic
products.description:
Rolex Automatic Watch

A Rolex Automatic Watch represents the highest standards of Swiss watchmaking, combining precision engineering, luxury craftsmanship, and timeless design. Unlike quartz watches that rely on batteries, Rolex automatic watches are powered by the movement of the wearer's wrist through a self-winding mechanical movement.

Key Features
Self-Winding Automatic Movement

Rolex automatic watches use a Perpetual rotor system that automatically winds the mainspring as the watch is worn. This innovative technology ensures reliable performance and eliminates the need for manual winding under normal use.

Swiss Precision

Every Rolex automatic movement is manufactured and tested to meet extremely high standards of accuracy, durability, and reliability. Most modern Rolex watches are certified as Superlative Chronometers, offering exceptional timekeeping performance.

Premium Materials

Rolex uses only high-quality materials, including:

Oystersteel (904L stainless steel)
18k Yellow Gold
18k White Gold
Everose Gold (Rolex's proprietary rose gold alloy)
Platinum
Scratch-resistant sapphire crystal
Water Resistance

Many Rolex automatic models feature the iconic Oyster case, providing excellent water resistance and protection against dust and moisture.

Timeless Design

Rolex watches are renowned for their elegant aesthetics, making them suitable for both formal occasions and everyday wear. Their classic design ensures lasting appeal across generations.

products.name: Omega Seamaster Diver 300M
products.description:
### Product Overview

The **Omega Seamaster Diver 300M** is a legendary luxury dive watch that seamlessly blends rugged professional utility with sophisticated everyday style. Famously known as the definitive "James Bond" watch, it features an instantly recognizable design backed by top-tier Swiss engineering.

---

### Key Specifications & Details

* **Case & Dimensions:** 42mm Stainless Steel case (13.7mm thickness, 50mm lug-to-lug).
* **Dial & Bezel:** High-gloss, laser-engraved ceramic ($ZrO_2$) wave dial paired with a ceramic unidirectional rotating bezel featuring a white enamel diving scale.
* **Movement:** Omega Co-Axial Master Chronometer Calibre 8800, visible through a sapphire crystal caseback.
* **Power Reserve:** 55 Hours.
* **Water Resistance:** 300 Meters (1,000 feet) featuring a signature conical Helium Escape Valve at 10 o'clock.

---

### Standout Features

* **METAS Certified Precision:** Rigorously tested to meet the highest Swiss standards for elite accuracy, power reserve, and water resistance.
* **Ultra-Magnetic Resistance:** Completely immune to magnetic fields up to 15,000 gauss, protecting the movement from everyday electronics.
* **Exceptional Legibility:** Bold skeleton hands and raised indexes filled with high-grade Super-LumiNova for perfect readability in low-light environments.

---

### Why Choose the Seamaster Diver 300M?

* **Iconic Horological Heritage:** Own a piece of cinematic and maritime history. It carries a legendary reputation that holds its prestige and value incredibly well.
* **The Ultimate Versatile Luxury:** It is one of the few true "do-it-all" timepieces—perfectly engineered to survive a deep-sea dive, yet elegant enough to wear under a suit cuff at a formal event.
* **Superior Mechanical Longevity:** The Co-Axial escapement drastically reduces internal friction over time, meaning the watch retains its precision longer and requires fewer service intervals than standard luxury movements.

products.name: High pressure wireless washer
products.description:
*Multi-Purpose Wireless High Pressure Washer*

48V Rechargeable Electric Pressure Washer Gun Machine Tool for Bike, Cleaning, Gardening.

You can use it anytime, anywhere. No need to worry about water supply, because it can take water from taps, rivers, buckets and even water bottles. You can take it to the garden, vegetable garden or outdoors.

You can change the nozzles angle of the cordless power washer cleaner by rotating. A smaller angle has stronger cleaning power, and a larger angle has a wider cleaning range. Also, a foam tank (about 400ml) in the package can effectively clean stains, such as doors & windows. 48V 7.5Ah rechargeable battery lasts above 30min (use 1-3 times on one charge). With 450 PSI working pressure and a flow rate of 240L/h, the portable pressure washer can produce more than 5m of pumping drop. 32.8ft water pipe and a filter can filter out impurities, debris, leaves, insects, and sand effectively, and better protect the portable pressure washer pump.

*Price:- 2200/-*
*200/- cod extra and advance for COD*

*Best for bestest*

products.name: Patek philippe calatrava
products.description:
Patek Philippe Calatrava

Selling Price: ₹30,000
Original Price: ₹20,00,000 – ₹50,00,000+ (depending on reference and material)

About the Patek Philippe Calatrava

The Calatrava is one of the most iconic and prestigious dress watch collections from Patek Philippe. Introduced in 1932, it represents timeless elegance, simplicity, and traditional Swiss watchmaking excellence. The collection is known for its clean dial design, refined proportions, and exceptional craftsmanship.

Key Features

Premium Swiss-inspired luxury design

Elegant and minimalist dress-watch styling

Automatic mechanical movement

Open-heart dial showcasing the movement

Stainless steel and rose gold-tone construction

Roman numeral hour markers

Sapphire crystal-inspired clear display

Exhibition-style movement window

Comfortable stainless steel bracelet

Suitable for formal and luxury occasions


Design Highlights

This Calatrava-inspired model features a sophisticated white dial with bold Roman numerals and a beautifully crafted open-heart window at the 6 o'clock position, allowing a glimpse of the mechanical movement. The two-tone bracelet and rose gold accents enhance its premium appearance, making it an ideal choice for those who appreciate classic luxury.

Specifications

Movement: Automatic Mechanical

Display: Analog

Dial Color: White

Case Material: Stainless Steel

Bezel: Rose Gold Tone

Strap: Two-Tone Stainless Steel Bracelet

Glass: Scratch-Resistant Crystal

Water Resistance: Daily Splash Resistant


Package Includes

Patek Philippe Calatrava Watch

Premium Watch Box

Protective Packaging


Perfect For

Business Professionals

Formal Events

Weddings & Parties

Luxury Watch Enthusiasts

Premium Gifting


Why the Calatrava is Famous:
The Calatrava is often considered the benchmark for luxury dress watches. Its philosophy of "elegance through simplicity" has made it one of the most respected watch collections in the world and a symbol of refined taste and prestige.
